briefs.title: BC Ferry Terminal Restricted-Use Property Valuations Updated for 2025 Taxation Year
briefs.summary: B.C. Reg. 277/2024 amends the Restricted-Use Property Valuation Regulation to update BC Ferries terminal property assessments and actual values from the 2024 to the 2025 taxation year, with new schedules effective December 31, 2024.
briefs.action_required: Review updated 2025 property assessment schedules if your business owns or leases BC Ferries terminal land.

key_dates.label: BC Restricted-Use Property Valuation — 2025 taxation year assessment date takes effect
